name: Rijssen-Holten (Netherlands)
description: Per pale maroon and white, bearing a large counterchanged emblem of two interlocking shields with wavy lines.
history: Flag of the municipality of Rijssen-Holten in the province of Overijssel, formed in 2001; the flag bears a modern counterchanged municipal emblem.

features.role: a counterchanged emblem of two interlocking shields with wavy lines
